text.title: Puppeteer Output Capture (Screenshots, PDFs, HAR) Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the puppeteer-output-capture methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-format-defaults
step.action: For bulk screenshots: jpeg/webp quality 80. For PDF: printBackground true + preferCSSPageSize. For HAR: enable via puppeteer-har or CDP.

step.name: anchor-wait-for-pdf
step.action: Identify a stable selector that means the page has finished rendering. Add waitForSelector + (if fonts matter) document.fonts.ready.

step.name: scrubber
step.action: Apply regex scrubber for Bearer, JWT, Set-Cookie, card numbers, email patterns before persistence.

step.name: bounded-paths
step.action: Compute /tmp/agent-run/<job-id>/ and create on demand; emit cleanup hook on job end.
